framework_name: MITRE Common Attack Pattern Enumeration and Classification (CAPEC) — Sample

techniques.name: Exploitation of Trusted Identifiers
techniques.description: An attacker guesses the identifiers used to access resources.

techniques.name: SQL Injection
techniques.description: Inject SQL commands in entry points.

techniques.name: Try Common or Default Usernames and Passwords
techniques.description: Brute force with common credential lists.

techniques.name: Phishing
techniques.description: Send deceptive communications to obtain sensitive information.

techniques.name: Exploitation of Privilege/Trust
techniques.description: Gain privileged access through trust relationships.

techniques.name: Code Injection
techniques.description: Inject code into a target environment.

techniques.name: Kerberoasting
techniques.description: Request service tickets and crack them offline.
